title: Trump Prank

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a single or multi-message switch
record:
a trump/fart noise on it

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The switch user pranks people by pressing the switch to make a trump noise.
2. Encourage them to press again with comments like "I hope there's no more of that!" or "Who did that come from?"

tooltipText: Prank people by making a fart noise with the switch!
